eyebrow.en: Gen AI Literacy Breakout · Grade K
eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado K
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp K
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف K
eyebrow.hi: जनरेटिव एआई साक्षरता ब्रेकआउट · कक्षा K
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت K
eyebrow.zh: 生成式AI素养破解 · 幼儿园

chrome.sub: A robot helper can guess. A puppy is alive. Can you tell them apart? Open four locks and meet a helper that guesses.
chrome.briefP: An AI helper is a computer helper. It makes guesses. It is not alive. Look at the clues. Then open all four locks. Each lock tells you why.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You met an AI helper. It is a computer helper that guesses. It is not alive. It can be wrong. You are the boss. Great job!

clues.title: What is a helper?
clues.body: An AI helper is a computer helper. It makes guesses. It is not alive.

clues.title: Living things
clues.body: A puppy is alive. A plant grows. You are alive too. A robot is not alive.

clues.title: A good guess
clues.body: An AI helper looks and guesses. Sometimes it is right. Sometimes it is wrong.

clues.title: You check
clues.body: You can think. You can check. If a guess looks wrong, ask a grown-up.

clues.title: You choose
clues.body: A helper can guess. But you pick. You are the boss, not the robot.

clues.title: A yummy fact
clues.body: Ice cream is cold and sweet. That is fun, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: Who Is Alive?
options: A puppy that runs and eats
A robot helper on a screen
A toy block on the floor
locks.reason: A puppy is alive. It runs, eats, and grows. A robot helper and a toy block are not alive.

locks.title: True About Helpers
locks.q: Tap EVERY true thing about an AI helper.

items.t: It is a real living puppy

locks.reason: An AI helper is a computer helper that guesses, and it can be wrong. It is not alive, and it is not always right.

locks.title: Guess Word
locks.q: An AI helper looks and makes a ______.
locks.reason: An AI helper does not just know. It makes a guess from what it sees, so it can be wrong.

locks.title: Check the Guess
locks.q: The helper guesses. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First the helper GUESSES. Then you CHECK the guess. If you are not sure, ASK a grown-up.
